# Groundnut, Bajra, Jowar
# Generated by KrishiMitra AI Knowledge Base Builder
# Source: ICAR guidelines + agricultural research literature
# Last updated: 2024-25 season

# ICAR Package of Practices for Indian Farmers

## Groundnut (Arachis hypogaea) Kharif Crop

### Varieties and Seed Rate
- **Varieties:** TAG-24, K-6, GG-20
- **Seed Rate:** 80-100 kg/ha

### Planting Details
- **Spacing:** 30 cm x 10 cm (Row x Plant)
- **Seeding Depth:** 2.5-3 cm

### Seed Treatment
- **Thiram + Carbendazim** at a rate of 4 g/kg seed

### Fertilizer Application
- **Basal Dose:** N: 20 kg/ha, P: 60 kg/ha, K: 30 kg/ha
- **Split Schedule:**
  - Urea (N): 15 kg/ha at pegging stage
  - Muriate of Potash (KCl) or DAP (P+K): 20 kg/ha at pegging stage

### Rhizobium Inoculation
- Apply Rhizobium inoculant as per package instructions

### Gypsum Application
- **Gypsum:** 500 kg/ha at pegging stage for calcium

### Irrigation Schedule
- **Critical Irrigations:**
  - First irrigation at pegging stage (10-12 days after sowing)
  - Second irrigation at pod filling stage (30-40 days after pegging)

### Pests and Diseases Management
- **Thrips:** ETL 15/thrips per plant; control with Dimethoate 25 EC @ 1 L/ha
- **Leaf Miner:** Control with Quinalphos 25EC @ 1 L/ha
- **Spodoptera:** Control with Chlorpyrifos 40 EC @ 1.5 L/ha

### Diseases Management
- **Tikka Leaf Spot (Cercospora):** Control with Chlorothalonil 75 WP @ 2 g/L
- **Stem Rot (Sclerotium):** Control with Trichoderma spp.

### Yield and Market Price
- **Rainfed:** 15-20 q/ha
- **Irrigated:** 25-30 q/ha
- **MSP 2024-25:** Rs. 6783/q

## Bajra (Pearl Millet, Pennisetum glaucum) Kharif Crop

### Varieties and Seed Rate
- **Varieties:** HHB-67 Improved, Pusa 322, Raj 171
- **Seed Rate:** 4-5 kg/ha

### Fertilizer Application
- **Basal Dose:** N: 80 kg/ha, P: 40 kg/ha, K: 40 kg/ha
- **Split Schedule:**
  - Urea (N): 20 kg/ha at tillering stage
  - Muriate of Potash (KCl) or DAP (P+K): 15 kg/ha at panicle initiation

### Pest Management
- **Stem Borer:** Control with granules in the whorl stage as per package instructions

### Disease Management
- **Downy Mildew:** Seed treatment with Metalaxyl 6 g/kg

### Yield and Market Price
- **Yield:** 20-25 q/ha
- **MSP 2024-25:** Rs. 2625/q

## Jowar (Sorghum, Sorghum bicolor) Kharif+Rabi Crop

### Varieties and Seed Rate
- **Varieties:** CSH-16, SPV-462, M-35-1
- **Seed Rate:** 10-12 kg/ha

### Fertilizer Application
- **Basal Dose:** N: 80 kg/ha, P: 40 kg/ha, K: 20 kg/ha
- **Split Schedule:**
  - Urea (N): 30 kg/ha at tillering stage
  - Muriate of Potash (KCl) or DAP (P+K): 15 kg/ha at panicle initiation

### Pest Management
- **Shoot Fly:** ETL 10% dead hearts; control with Carbofuran 3G in the whorl stage as per package instructions
- **Stem Borer:** Control with granules in the whorl stage as per package instructions

### Disease Management
- **Anthracnose:** Control with appropriate fungicides as per local recommendations
- **Grain Mold:** Control with appropriate fungicides as per local recommendations

### Yield and Market Price
- **Yield:** 25-35 q/ha
- **MSP 2024-25:** Rs. 3371/q

---

**Note:**
- Always follow the latest guidelines from ICAR/CIB&RC for specific varieties, pesticides, and fertilizers.
- Adjust application rates based on soil type, climate, and local conditions.
- Regularly monitor crops for pests and diseases to ensure timely intervention.

This package of practices is designed to provide a comprehensive guide for farmers to achieve optimal yields while maintaining sustainable agricultural practices.
